inputs.label: Internal Mill Diameter (D)
inputs.businessContext: Inner diameter of the mill shell, measured without liners. Determines critical speed and power draw.

businessContext_i18n.en: Inner diameter of the mill shell, measured without liners. Determines critical speed and power draw.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Astarsız ölçülen değirmen gövdesinin iç çapı. Kritik hız ve güç tüketimini belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Innendurchmesser des Mahlwerks, gemessen ohne Auskleidung. Bestimmt kritische Drehzahl und Leistungsaufnahme.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre intérieur de la cuve du broyeur, mesuré sans revêtements. Détermine la vitesse critique et la puissance absorbée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro interior del casco del molino, medido sin revestimientos. Determina la velocidad crítica y la potencia.

inputs.label: Internal Mill Length (L)
inputs.businessContext: Effective grinding length of the mill. Affects charge volume and power.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective grinding length of the mill. Affects charge volume and power.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değirmenin etkin öğütme uzunluğu. Şarj hacmini ve gücü etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektive Mahlkammerlänge. Beeinflusst Füllungsgrad und Leistung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de broyage effective du broyeur. Affecte le volume de la charge et la puissance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud efectiva de molienda del molino. Afecta el volumen de carga y la potencia.

inputs.label: Mill Rotation Speed
inputs.businessContext: Actual rotational speed of the mill. Typically 65-80% of critical speed for optimal operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual rotational speed of the mill. Typically 65-80% of critical speed for optimal operation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değirmenin gerçek dönüş hızı. Optimum çalışma için tipik olarak kritik hızın %65-80'i.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche Drehzahl der Mühle. Typischerweise 65-80 % der kritischen Drehzahl für optimalen Betrieb.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de rotation réelle du broyeur. Généralement 65-80 % de la vitesse critique pour un fonctionnement optimal.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de rotación real del molino. Típicamente 65-80% de la velocidad crítica para una operación óptima.

inputs.label: Ball Filling Fraction (J)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of mill volume occupied by grinding media (balls). Affects power consumption and throughput.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of mill volume occupied by grinding media (balls). Affects power consumption and throughput.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değirmen hacminin öğütme ortamı (bilyalar) tarafından kaplanan oranı. Güç tüketimini ve verimi etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil des Mahlkammervolumens, der von Mahlkörpern (Kugeln) eingenommen wird. Beeinflusst Leistungsaufnahme und Durchsatz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction du volume du broyeur occupée par les corps broyants (boulets). Affecte la consommation d'énergie et le débit.
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción del volumen del molino ocupada por el medio de molienda (bolas). Afecta el consumo de energía y el rendimiento.

inputs.label: Ball Bulk Density
inputs.businessContext: Bulk density of the grinding media charge. For steel balls, typical is 4800 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Bulk density of the grinding media charge. For steel balls, typical is 4800 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğütme ortamı şarjının yığın yoğunluğu. Çelik bilyalar için tipik değer 4800 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schüttdichte der Mahlkörperfüllung. Für Stahlkugen typischerweise 4800 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique apparente de la charge de corps broyants. Pour des boulets en acier, typiquement 4800 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad aparente de la carga de medio de molienda. Para bolas de acero, típicamente 4800 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Motor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the motor and drive system. Used to calculate required input electrical power.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the motor and drive system. Used to calculate required input electrical power.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor ve tahrik sisteminin verimliliği. Gerekli giriş elektrik gücünü hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des Motor- und Antriebssystems. Wird zur Berechnung der erforderlichen elektrischen Eingangsleistung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité du moteur et du système d'entraînement. Utilisée pour calculer la puissance électrique d'entrée requise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del motor y sistema de transmisión. Se utiliza para calcular la potencia eléctrica de entrada requerida.

breakdown.label: Critical Speed
breakdown.description: Theoretical speed at which grinding media centrifuges.

breakdown.label: % of Critical Speed
breakdown.description: Operating speed as a percentage of critical speed.

breakdown.label: Mill Mechanical Power
breakdown.description: Power required at the mill shell (pinion shaft).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
